data.title: Greyline™ Launches Medical Apparel Brand with a Focus on Independent Retailers Nationwide
data.description: Greyline™ has made its entrance into the market by offering a new collection of medical apparel tailored for healthcare professionals and retailers catering to them. The brand, based in Hazelwood, Missouri, unveiled its refined approach on March 26, 2026.

data.title: Abraxas Group Launches First Platform Investment with Acquisition of Dolci Lusso
data.description: Abraxas Group has broadened its investment scope with its initial platform investment, facilitating focused value enhancement efforts in areas like product diversification, marketing optimization, and global market expansion. The firm's recent move signifies a strategic expansion in its investment portfolio, bringing about opportunities for growth and development. The development was announced in Chicago on March 26, 2026.

data.title: ORVANA GRADUATES TO TRADING ON OTCQX BEST MARKET IN THE UNITED STATES
data.description: Toronto, March 26, 2026 - Orvana Minerals Corp. (TSX: ORV) (OTCQX: ORVMF) has reported that its common shares are now listed on the OTCQX Best Market under the ticker symbol ORVMF. This transition signifies a milestone for the company, expanding its reach to a broader investor base. The change came into effect as of today, providing investors with increased accessibility to Orvana's shares, strengthening its position in the market.

data.title: Robert E. and Jenny D. Discovery Awards Gala benefits Kirkland Scholarship Fund
data.description: In Union City, Tennessee, the 2026 Robert E. and Jenny D. Kirkland Discovery Awards Gala was held at Discovery Park of America on March 21, 2026. Over 200 attendees, including thought leaders, policymakers, and philanthropists, gathered for the event. The gala serves as an annual platform to honor individuals who are making significant contributions to various fields.

data.title: Plant Sciences Genetics Introduces VS-60, Ushering in a New Era of Strawberry Breeding
data.description: In Watsonville, California, on March 26, 2026, Plant Sciences Genetics (PSG) unveiled their latest product, the VS-17.5417-060 (known as VS-60) strawberry variety. This new introduction aims to achieve a balanced portfolio by focusing on enhancing grower performance while prioritizing consumer flavor and quality. This new strawberry variety exemplifies PSG's commitment to innovation in agriculture.

data.title: RIT launches hands-on Bachelor of Science degree in artificial intelligence
data.description: Rochester Institute of Technology has introduced a new interdisciplinary undergraduate program focused on artificial intelligence (AI). This program combines essential programming and algorithmic concepts with practical experience in various specialized fields of AI, such as agentic AI and robotics. The initiative is based in Rochester, N.Y., and is aimed at preparing students for careers in AI.

data.title: Nymbl Systems and CRT Industry Expert Dan Fedor Team Up for Must-Attend Webinar on CRT Business Strategies for 2026
data.description: A virtual event will take place on April 1 focusing on key issues in the healthcare industry. This event will cover top denials in Cardiac Resynchronization Therapy (CRT), revenue loss prevention, artificial intelligence (AI) compliance, telehealth protocols, and policies for replacing Powered Mobility Devices (PMD). Hosted by Nymbl Systems, a prominent provider of cloud-based practice management solutions for orthotics, the event aims to provide insights into these critical areas. Taking place in DUBLIN, Ohio, it is scheduled for March 26, 2026.

data.title: Fistula Foundation Advances Women's Global Health and Equity With 19,577 Surgeries and $28M Raised in 2025
data.description: Since 2009, over 125,000 surgeries have been performed for women with childbirth injuries. In San Jose, California, on March 26, 2026, Fistula Foundation, a prominent organization treating obstetric fistula and related childbirth injuries, reported a record-breaking year with 19,577 surgeries conducted.

data.title: From Fragmented Services to Connected Systems: Chicago Goes Live with Regionwide Community Information Exchange
data.description: Chicago has introduced a groundbreaking "Community Information Exchange," linking healthcare and social services for comprehensive care. This unified network is breaking down barriers to housing and recovery by replacing fragmented systems. The initiative aims to improve access to services for a wide range of individuals by creating a streamlined approach. This innovative approach has already connected over 500 health and social service organizations across the city, enabling them to share information and coordinate care effectively. The initiative is expected to benefit more than 1 million individuals in need of support.

data.title: IAB Diligence Platform Expands for 2026 Regulations with Friction-Free Vendor Participation and AI-assisted RFI completion optimized for our industry
data.description: SafeGuard Privacy revealed the latest 2026 enhancements to the IAB Diligence Platform, featuring improved regulatory evaluations, streamlined vendor engagement with no-fee response options, and increased AI integration via Privacy Assist™ to simplify automated RFI completion. These updates aim to provide smoother processes and better support for stakeholders involved.

data.title: Ordoro and SPS Commerce Partner to Support High-Growth Amazon and Walmart Brands
data.description: In a bid to assist brands in safeguarding margins and enhancing operational efficiency during expansion, two major eCommerce platforms have joined forces. The collaboration between Ordoro, a prominent eCommerce operations platform, and SPS Commerce has been confirmed. The partnership aims to provide support for brands as they scale up their operations. This initiative was unveiled in Austin, Texas on March 26, 2026.

data.title: Rising Energy Costs Drive Phius-Certified Passive Building Expansion in Canada
data.description: In Atlantic Canada, a significant 30% of homeowners are currently facing energy poverty, allocating over 40% of their income towards energy expenses. To address this issue, Phius, a non-profit organization, presents a reliable solution tailored for the climate, aiming to substantially decrease energy consumption. The data was revealed in a recent report, showcasing the pressing need for effective strategies to combat the financial burden of energy costs faced by a substantial portion of homeowners in the region.

data.title: Accio Data Announces iCOVER Integration, Expanding Global Screening Capabilities
data.description: Accio Data, a Texas-based company, revealed on March 26, 2026, that they have seamlessly incorporated iCOVER into their background screening software for Consumer Reporting Agencies (CRAs). This integration is a significant milestone for the company and will greatly benefit CRAs and screening partners by enhancing their capabilities.

data.title: Sew Happy to Host "Cuddle® Up with BERNINA" Two-Day Serger Workshop
data.description: A two-day hands-on event will be held in Niles, Michigan on March 26, 2026, by Sew Happy Sales & Service, an authorized BERNINA dealer. This event aims to provide expert instruction, take-home projects, and creative inspiration for serger enthusiasts. The event, "Cuddle® Up with BERNINA," offers a unique opportunity for attendees to enhance their skills and knowledge in the sewing field. This event promises to be a productive and fun experience, catering to individuals interested in serging.
